meta.homeDescription: Blen is a dating app that helps you find your perfect match based on your personality and interests.
meta.homeKeywords: dating, match, personality, interests, dating app

heroContent.description: AI analyzes your emotional patterns and relationship compatibility.

aboutContent.title: AI deeply analyzes your relationship personality.
aboutContent.description: Blen is an AI-powered relationship insight platform designed based on real relationship psychology and behavioral research. Our goal is to help people build healthier, more intentional, and emotionally compatible relationships.

ourMission.title: Our Mission
ourMission.text1: We believe meaningful relationships begin with self-understanding.
ourMission.text2: Blen was created to help people deeply understand their emotional patterns, communication styles, and relationship tendencies through AI-powered insights.
ourMission.text3: Our mission is to transform relationship psychology into a more personal, reflective, and meaningful experience.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.subTitle: We prioritize:
approach.text2: Our goal is to move beyond superficial matching and create real, meaningful connections.

feature.title: Everything you need To find your person

box1.title: AI Personality Insights
box1.description: Understand your emotional patterns, communication style, and relationship tendencies through AI-powered analysis.

box2.title: Compatibility Reports
box2.description: Discover how similar — or different — your relationship personalities are through detailed AI-powered compatibility reports.

box3.title: Meaningful Connection
box3.description: Designed to go beyond appearances and help people build deeper, more intentional relationships.

download.title: Deeper compatibility starts here.
download.description: Understand your emotional patterns and relationship tendencies through AI.
